info.title: dotnet-encrypt
info.description: `dotnet encrypt` is an enterprise grade encryption and key management tool that encrypts and decrypts files from  the command line. It uses Crypteron's managed data encryption and key management platform to handle all complexities of key management. By storing your encryption keys outside your application and cloud provider (who already have your databases *and* compute instances), compliance is simpler and security is improved with no additional effort.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String, Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String, Boolean))

options.name: --out
options.description: Optional output file path. If skipped, a .encrypted extension is automatically added/removed.

options.name: --appsecret
options.description: Your Crypteron AppSecret from https://my.crypteron.com. If blank, you'll be prompted for it

options.name: --unmanaged-key
options.description: An unmanaged/naked 256 bit symmetric key, in hex. If blank, you'll be prompted for it

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: WARNING: Overwrite output file even if it exists

options.name: --unmanaged-keygen
options.description: Locally generate a cryptographically secure 256 bit unmanaged key
